name: Suspicious Sign-in Review
description: Step-by-step workflow for identity sign-in investigations.

steps.title: Validate identity signal
steps.guidance: Review the alert category, user entity, and sign-in context to confirm the activity is suspicious.

steps.title: Hunt user activity
steps.guidance: Jump to Hunting and run user-focused queries with the selected entity context.

steps.title: Plan user response
steps.guidance: Document whether session revocation, password reset, or account disablement is appropriate.
